Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Complaint, Memorandum Of Poiints & Authorities In Support Of Motion To Strike, Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David A. Harris of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP (415-546-7500) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Sondra E. Kirwan of the Menekshe Law Firm (408-358-1200) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS JOHN POLLARD AND SF GARAGE COMPANY, INC.'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Complaint, Request For Judicial Notice is denied in its entirety. The complaint adequately alleges alter ego liability and entitlement to punitive damages and abatement of the alleged nuisance. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
